content.instruction: Read each sentence and rewrite it in your own words. Keep the meaning the same, but change the wording.

source.text: These are common workplace sentences. Practice rewriting them in a different way.

activities.instruction: Rewrite each sentence. Use different words but keep the same meaning. Each answer should be a full sentence.

questions.Q1: I am very busy today because I have many meetings.
questions.Q2: She arrived late to the office because of heavy traffic.
questions.Q3: We need to finish the report before Friday.
questions.Q4: The manager was happy with the team's performance.

reference_answers.Q1: Today is very hectic for me as I have several meetings scheduled.
reference_answers.Q2: Heavy traffic caused her to be late to the office.
reference_answers.Q3: The report must be completed by Friday.
reference_answers.Q4: The team's performance pleased the manager.
